title: BOTTLE BOTTLE Insulated Water Bottle 950ml(32oz) Stainless Steel Sports Water Bottles with Straw Dual-use Lid Drink Flask Design for Gym with Pill Box (Rabbits)
features: [Dual Use Lid Design] This stainless steel water bottle has a dual-use leak-proof lid. You can drink directly through the straw lid and twist the cap to pour the water. This water bottle with straw is equipped with a handle so you can carry it easily

[With Pill Box] As a water bottle with pill storage, it has a storage space at the bottom that can be rotated. You can use this space to store pills and vitamins, even coins and keys. Suitable as a sports bottle

✔ [Vacuum Insulated] The insulated water bottle features double-walled stainless steel that keeps liquids ice cold or boiling for a long time. This leak-proof bottle keeps your drink at a suitable temperature for everyday use or during sports

【Healthy material】: This stainless steel water bottle is made of food-grade material, BPA and lead free. As a sports water bottle, it is resistant to punctures, oxidation, and taste transfer, with a longer lifespan
Versatile: This sports water bottle is not only suitable for indoor sports scenes, but also as an outdoor water bottle or camping water bottle, suitable for mountaineering, hiking, and other scenes
description: BOTTLE BOTTLE 32oz Insulated Water Bottle Stainless Steel Sport Water Bottle with Straw Dual-use Lid Design for Gym with Pill Box
